name: codex-claude-orchestrator
description: Let Codex orchestrate persistent Claude Code workers and role-routed GPT/Claude specialists for fast, verified local development.

interface.longDescription: Keeps Codex in charge of intent and verification while a persistent Opus parent routes discovery, implementation, debugging, review, and security work to Haiku, Sonnet, Opus, or Fable, with GPT-5.6 native fallback roles.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this bounded local outcome through Claude and verify the result.
